_comment: Single source for skill availability across harnesses. Set a tier per skill HERE; each adapter renders its harness's native control (Claude 4-way skillOverrides; Copilot disabledSkills; OpenCode permission.skill). Skills not listed default to 'on'.

_tiers.on: name + description in context; model can auto-invoke. Reserve for genuinely every-session skills (the description costs tokens always).
_tiers.name-only: name in context, description omitted; model can still discover. Generic dev skills used across projects but not every session.
_tiers.user-invocable-only: hidden from model context (near-zero token cost); only you invoke via '/'. Domain/workflow-specific skills.
_tiers.off: fully hidden, not even in the '/' menu. For genuinely dead skills.
